metadata.synopsis: The Ghoulies are back and more devilish than ever as they turn an unsuspecting carnival into a house of pandemonium in this wildly outrageous sequel to the smash hit "Ghoulies!" Damon Martin and Royal Dano star in this cult-classic!
metadata.title: Ghoulies II

metadata.synopsis: Mark wants to go all the way. His girlfriend won’t, but he meets a beautiful vampire who will! The problem? He’s starting to feel a little batty.
metadata.title: Once Bitten

metadata.synopsis: After being bitten on the neck during a night of passion, an agent is convinced he's a vampire.
metadata.title: Vampire's Kiss
